'''âm-m-ng''' ('''kamamang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fiatsplain|fiatsplain]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-m-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fiatsplain|fiatsplain]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-m-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kamamang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimamang|thimamang]] || [[word:jimamang|jimamang]] || [[word:shimamang|shimamang]] || [[word:kimamang|kimamang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumamang|thuthumamang]] || [[word:jujumamang|jujumamang]] || [[word:shushumamang|shushumamang]] || [[word:kukumamang|kukumamang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumamang|thumamang]] || [[word:jumamang|jumamang]] || [[word:shumamang|shumamang]] || [[word:kumamang|kumamang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumamang|thumamang]] || [[word:jumamang|jumamang]] || [[word:shumamang|shumamang]] || [[word:kumamang|kumamang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themamang|themamang]] || [[word:jemamang|jemamang]] || [[word:shemamang|shemamang]] || [[word:kemamang|kemamang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomamang|thothomamang]] || [[word:jojomamang|jojomamang]] || [[word:shoshomamang|shoshomamang]] || [[word:kokomamang|kokomamang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomamang|thomamang]] || [[word:jomamang|jomamang]] || [[word:shomamang|shomamang]] || [[word:komamang|komamang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomamang|thomamang]] || [[word:jomamang|jomamang]] || [[word:shomamang|shomamang]] || [[word:komamang|komamang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmamang|thĂŠmamang]] || [[word:jĂŠmamang|jĂŠmamang]] || [[word:shĂŠmamang|shĂŠmamang]] || [[word:kĂŠmamang|kĂŠmamang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamamang|thathamamang]] || [[word:jajamamang|jajamamang]] || [[word:shashamamang|shashamamang]] || [[word:kakamamang|kakamamang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamamang|thamamang]] || [[word:jamamang|jamamang]] || [[word:shamamang|shamamang]] || [[word:kamamang|kamamang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamamang|thamamang]] || [[word:jamamang|jamamang]] || [[word:shamamang|shamamang]] || [[word:kamamang|kamamang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamamang|shamamang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamamang|goshamamang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamamang|gokishamamang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamamangnĂŒ|shamamangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamamangnknĂŒ|goshamamangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamamangnĂŒ|gokishamamangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamamangshĂ«|shamamangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamamangnkshĂ«|goshamamangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamamangshĂ«|gokishamamangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamamangro|shamamangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamamangnkro|goshamamangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamamangro|gokishamamangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamamangmu|shamamangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamamangnkmu|goshamamangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamamangmu|gokishamamangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamamangsher|shamamangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamamangnksher|goshamamangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamamangsher|gokishamamangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamamang|shamamang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamamangnkng|goshamamangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamamang|gokishamamang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamamangya|shamamangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamamangnkya|goshamamangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamamangya|gokishamamangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamamangyam|shamamangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamamangnkyam|goshamamangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamamangyam|gokishamamangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamamangnĂŒshĂ«|shamamangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamamangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshamamangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamamangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishamamangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamamangnĂŒro|shamamangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamamangnknĂŒro|goshamamangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamamangnĂŒro|gokishamamangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamamangnĂŒmu|shamamangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamamangnknĂŒmu|goshamamangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamamangnĂŒmu|gokishamamangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamamangshĂ«nĂŒ|shamamangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamamangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshamamangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamamangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishamamangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamamangshĂ«ro|shamamangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamamangnkshĂ«ro|goshamamangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamamangshĂ«ro|gokishamamangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamamangshĂ«mu|shamamangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamamangnkshĂ«mu|goshamamangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamamangshĂ«mu|gokishamamangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamamangronĂŒ|shamamangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamamangnkronĂŒ|goshamamangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamamangronĂŒ|gokishamamangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamamangroshĂ«|shamamangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamamangnkroshĂ«|goshamamangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamamangroshĂ«|gokishamamangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamamangromu|shamamangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamamangnkromu|goshamamangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamamangromu|gokishamamangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamamangmunĂŒ|shamamangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamamangnkmunĂŒ|goshamamangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamamangmunĂŒ|gokishamamangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamamangmushĂ«|shamamangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamamangnkmushĂ«|goshamamangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamamangmushĂ«|gokishamamangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamamangmuro|shamamangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamamangnkmuro|goshamamangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamamangmuro|gokishamamangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
